query:
SELECT qi.itemNumber, qi.itemType, qi.description, qi.totalPrice, qi.includesFixedCosts, qi.kitchenConfig
FROM quotationItems qi
JOIN quotations q ON qi.quotationId = q.id
WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%621%'
ORDER BY qi.itemNumber;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT qi.itemNumber, qi.itemType, qi.description, qi.totalPrice, qi.includesFixedCosts, qi.kitchenConfig
FROM quotationItems qi
JOIN quotations q ON qi.quotationId = q.id
WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%621%'
ORDER BY qi.itemNumber;
